title: Startup Context Payload
description: Startup routing payload returned when an agent needs the minimum safe context for entering or resuming work in a repository.

kind.description: Discriminator for the startup context payload shape.

target.description: Resolved target repository for the startup decision.

action_signals.description: Compact action-first summary ordered as blockers, allowed next action, proof, changed signals, selector-backed advisory detail, and agent-owned judgment.

task_posture_packet.description: Optional dynamic instruction packet emitted when task facts, config posture, workflow obligations, or module contributions change startup routing.

invoked_cli_identity.description: Observed identity of the Agentic Workspace CLI that produced this payload.

cli_compatibility.description: Compatibility assessment between the invoked CLI and any repo-configured CLI expectations.

installed_state_compatibility.description: Compatibility assessment across executable, repo payload, generated artifacts, and adapter contracts.

sibling_repo_aw_freshness.description: Cross-repo AW freshness posture for sibling repositories referenced by the current task.

kind.description: Discriminator for the local CLI invocation guidance.

primary.description: Preferred local command prefix for invoking Agentic Workspace.

source.description: Where the preferred invocation was resolved from.

bare_command.description: Default executable name agents may try first.

fallback_when_unavailable.description: Compact recovery guidance when the bare command is not on PATH.

status.description: Whether the invocation identity needs attention before non-trivial work.

reasons.description: Compact reasons the invoked CLI may not match the repo's expected invocation.

invoked_source_class.description: Class of CLI module that produced this startup payload.

invoked_target_relation.description: Whether the invoked CLI module appears inside or outside the target repo.

required_next_action.description: Immediate correction step before relying on the startup payload.

trust.description: Trust posture to apply until the invocation mismatch is resolved.

mismatch.description: Attention payload shown when startup detects a likely stale or wrong CLI invocation.

cli_invocation.description: Local command invocation guidance for PATH-limited agent environments.

id.description: Stable identifier used to reference this record.

command.description: Command string or command name used by this contract.

surface.description: Surface text value used by this contract.

why.description: Why text value used by this contract.

items.description: One entry in the startup sequence list.

startup_sequence.description: Ordered surfaces and commands an agent should use before opening broader repo context.

feature_tier.description: Resolved feature tier and package footprint for the target repository.

context_router.description: Available compact context-router views and when to use each one.

adaptive_routing.description: Machine-readable need classification, read budget, and escalation detail commands for this startup packet.

todo_active_count.description: Todo active count numeric value used by this contract.

active_execplan.description: Active execplan contract value used by this contract.

planning_status.description: Planning status text value used by this contract.

active_state_summary.description: Small active-work projection used to decide whether raw planning state needs to be opened.

continuation_view.description: Lossy continuation/re-grounding view projected from existing owner surfaces so a low-context agent can identify preserved intent, allowed claim class, next safe action, source freshness, omissions, and drill-down routes without treating startup as a durable state owner.

continuation_reorientation.description: Stronger continuation/compression-risk reorientation packet emitted only when a concrete continuation trigger is present, carrying repo posture, active intent refs, completion boundary, anti-goals, proof/claim boundary, and next safe action as a startup projection rather than a durable store.

package_boundary.description: Current package/root boundary information for the command invocation.

items.description: One entry in the authority markers list.

authority_markers.description: Authority markers relevant to startup, ownership, and safe editing.

action.description: Action text value used by this contract.

summary.description: Short human-readable summary for this entry.

command.description: Command string or command name used by this contract.

run.description: Run contract value used by this contract.

risk.description: Risk text value used by this contract.

items.description: One entry in the required inputs list.

required_inputs.description: Ordered required inputs entries used by this contract.

next_proof.description: Next proof text value used by this contract.

items.description: One entry in the read first list.

read_first.description: Ordered read first entries used by this contract.

open_execplan_only_when.description: Open execplan only when text value used by this contract.

immediate_next_allowed_action.description: Next bounded action the agent may take without reading broader surfaces.

workflow_sufficiency.description: Small decision record that says whether the current packet is enough for the next step or which exact detail field should be requested.

next_safe_action.description: Compact next-safe-action packet derived from startup routing, including proof and completion-claim guardrails.

skills.description: Compact startup projection over skill routing, required skill, recommendations, and catalog drill-down.

context.description: Supporting startup context for the primary next-safe-action decision, including compatibility projections for detail fields.

parent_intent_status.description: Parent/original-intent status preserving larger intent across bounded startup and implementation slices.

applicable_intent_status.description: Applicable-intent evidence, conflicts, missing authority, and manual-verification obligations for startup closeout safety.

planning_safety_gate.description: Planning ownership guard for broad, high-assurance, decomposed, or scope-widened work.

planning_revision.description: Optimistic Planning state revision observed by this read surface.

active_plan_reliance.description: Permission signal separating command-written integrity, planning freshness, and active-plan reliance.

continuation_state.description: Compact continuation-state contract for preserving only unfinished or handoff-relevant work, not historical residue.

authority_hierarchy.description: Authority and promotion-path guidance for deciding which repo surfaces are current instruction, durable memory, future work, or historical audit.

compliance_economics.description: Boundary statement for what Agentic Workspace can enforce directly and where it instead makes noncompliance visible or costly.

workflow_obligations.description: Repo-configured workflow obligations relevant to the startup context.

closeout_obligations.description: Closeout obligations that may apply before claiming work is complete.

memory_consult.description: Memory lookup guidance for durable repo knowledge when startup context says it is relevant.

operating_posture.description: Compact statement of the current operating mode and risk posture.

repo_posture.description: Compact effective repo posture ref, digest, reminder, provenance route, and reorientation triggers.

delegation_decision.description: Compact local delegation, escalation, clarification, or stay-local decision derived from local posture and task signals.

task_intent.description: Compact task-intent carry-forward guidance for subsequent implement --changed calls, including acceptance expectations when task text is present.

acceptance.description: Definition-of-done expectations inferred from task intent for selector-first startup drill-down.

durable_intent_promotion.description: Guidance for promoting non-finishable task intent into durable memory, docs, subsystem intent, or system intent.

intent_acknowledgement.description: Guidance for the middle path between silent inference and clarification halt: state inferred intent, first slice, non-goals, and correction point before non-direct work.

intent_evidence.description: Compact provenance and assumption evidence for the current task intent, including source chain, correction point, and clarification/proceed posture.

intent_elicitation_protocol.description: Routed natural-language intent elicitation protocol for task, initiative, repo/system, completion-boundary, anti-goal, and unresolved-assumption intent.

intent_custody.description: Compact custody projection for active intent refs, completion boundaries, anti-goals, provenance, freshness, and routing.

active_intent_contract.description: Active controlling-intent contract preserving chat, planning, external, and mixed intent sources before completion claims.

intent_satisfaction_matrix.description: Compact satisfaction matrix shape that maps active intent items to evidence, gaps, and the honest completion claim level.

durable_intent.description: Compact durable task, subsystem, and system intent pressure to consider before implementation.

skill_routing.description: Skill-discovery route and fallback guidance for task-specific instructions.

drill_down.description: Selector-first affordances for requesting omitted startup detail without widening the whole output.

proof.description: Proof-selection summary for the current startup or changed-path context.

items.description: One entry in the path boundaries list.

path_boundaries.description: Path-level ownership or package-boundary warnings that constrain the next action.

operating_posture.description: Resolved optimization, artifact, initiative, assurance, and delegation posture for this task.

workflow_obligations.description: Matched workflow obligations with stage, force, scope, and provenance.

improvement_obligations.description: Active improvement-pressure obligations that affect proof, closeout, allowed actions, or posture adherence.

skill_routes.description: Task-selected skills, prompts, or routing fragments.

allowed_actions.description: Actions allowed under the resolved posture.

forbidden_actions.description: Actions forbidden under the resolved posture.

proof_boundaries.description: Proof boundaries selected for the current task.

closeout_boundaries.description: Closeout and claim boundaries selected for the current task.

read_budget.description: Read-budget profile and selector/deep-read limits for this task.

authority_boundaries.description: Authority boundaries with source and owner provenance.

knowledge_gates.description: Compact pre-work knowledge gates selected when routed knowledge can change task interpretation, work shape, proof, allowed action, or completion claims.

gate_summary.description: Count and force summary for selected knowledge gates.

blocked_actions.description: Concrete actions blocked by selected knowledge gates.

next_allowed_action.description: Smallest safe next action after applying knowledge gates.

output_shape_requirements.description: Output-shape constraints selected for this task.

review_rubrics.description: Review rubrics selected for this task.

module_contributions.description: Matched module posture contributions with trigger and projection provenance.

provenance.description: Config, obligation, module, or command sources used to assemble this packet.

dynamic_instruction_projection.description: Compact dynamic AGENTS.md-style projection assembled for this task instead of static prose expansion.

posture_adherence.description: Closeout/report visibility for whether the selected posture was followed or requires explanation.

task_posture_packet.description: Task-specific posture and dynamic instruction packet selected from config, task facts, workflow obligations, and module declarations.

kind.description: Discriminator identifying the payload or record shape.

package.description: Fixed package value required by this contract.

version.description: Version text value used by this contract.

source_class.description: Allowed source class value for routing or validation.

confidence.description: Allowed confidence value for routing or validation.

module_path.description: Module path text value used by this contract.

package_root.description: Package root contract value used by this contract.

python_executable.description: Python executable text value used by this contract.

argv0.description: Argv0 text value used by this contract.

argv0_path.description: Argv0 path text value used by this contract.

path_executable.description: Path executable text value used by this contract.

target_relation.description: Allowed target relation value for routing or validation.

compatibility.description: Fixed compatibility value required by this contract.

expectation_source.description: Expectation source text value used by this contract.

invoked_cli_identity.description: Invoked cli identity details used by this contract.

kind.description: Discriminator identifying the payload or record shape.

reason.description: Short explanation for the selected status.

authority.description: Repo payload state owns compatibility for the current target.

payload.description: Installed repo payload compatibility and sync guidance.

adapter_contracts.description: Entry-surface adapter contracts covered by this model.

next_action.description: Suggested command when drift requires or recommends action.

rule.description: Policy rule for applying this packet.

installed_state_compatibility.description: Installed-state compatibility details used by startup and report surfaces.

kind.description: Discriminator identifying the payload or record shape.

status.description: Whether sibling AW posture was checked and whether it needs attention.

authority.description: Current repo remains authoritative for cross-repo workflow routing.

rule.description: Policy rule for using sibling AW posture.

sibling_repo_aw_freshness.description: Sibling repository AW freshness posture derived from the installed-state compatibility model.

name.description: Human-readable or lookup name for this entry.

configured.description: Configured true/false policy flag used by this contract.

items.description: One entry in the expected list.

expected.description: Expected contract value used by this contract.

actual.description: Actual text value used by this contract.

satisfied.description: Satisfied true/false policy flag used by this contract.

cli_compatibility_check.description: Cli compatibility check details used by this contract.

kind.description: Discriminator identifying the payload or record shape.

status.description: Current lifecycle, readiness, or health state.

configured.description: Configured true/false policy flag used by this contract.

enforcement.description: Allowed enforcement value for routing or validation.

enforcement_source.description: Enforcement source text value used by this contract.

expectation_source.description: Expectation source text value used by this contract.

expected_command.description: Expected command contract value used by this contract.

invocation_confidence.description: Allowed invocation confidence value for routing or validation.

items.description: One entry in the drift findings list.

drift_findings.description: Ordered drift findings entries used by this contract.

remediation.description: Remediation details used by this contract.

items.description: One entry in the checks list.

checks.description: Ordered checks entries used by this contract.

items.description: One entry in the failed checks list.

failed_checks.description: Ordered failed checks entries used by this contract.

rule.description: Policy rule that explains this contract behavior.

cli_compatibility.description: Cli compatibility details used by this contract.

path.description: Path segments or repository path used by this contract.

authority.description: Authority level or owner for this surface.

canonical_source.description: Source of truth for this generated, derived, or adapter surface.

safe_to_edit.description: Whether agents may edit this surface under the declared authority rules.

refresh_command.description: Command used to refresh this generated or managed surface.

authority_marker.description: Authority marker details used by this contract.

status.description: Current lifecycle, readiness, or health state.

cwd.description: Working directory context used when running the command.

warning.description: Warning contract value used by this contract.

package_root.description: Package root text value used by this contract.

package_boundary.description: Package boundary details used by this contract.

path.description: Path segments or repository path used by this contract.

authority.description: Authority level or owner for this surface.

warning.description: Warning contract value used by this contract.

requires_attention.description: Requires attention true/false policy flag used by this contract.

path_boundary.description: Path boundary details used by this contract.

status.description: Current lifecycle, readiness, or health state.

rule.description: Policy rule that explains this contract behavior.

query.description: Query text value used by this contract.

advanced_route_rule.description: Advanced route rule text value used by this contract.

available_advanced_route_command.description: Available advanced route command text value used by this contract.

items.description: One entry in the enabled advanced routes list.

enabled_advanced_routes.description: Ordered enabled advanced routes entries used by this contract.

items.description: One entry in the fallback when skills unavailable list.

fallback_when_skills_unavailable.description: Ordered fallback when skills unavailable entries used by this contract.

fallback_when_skills_unavailable_count.description: Fallback when skills unavailable count numeric value used by this contract.

fallback_detail.description: Fallback detail text value used by this contract.

fit_signal.description: Skill-fit signal text; not an AW-owned semantic task classification.

skill.description: Skill text value used by this contract.

fallback.description: Fallback text value used by this contract.

feature.description: Feature text value used by this contract.

items.description: One entry in the preferred routes list.

preferred_routes.description: Ordered preferred routes entries used by this contract.

skill_routing.description: Skill routing details used by this contract.

next_safe_action.description: Stable action id that names the safest next step.

why.description: Human-readable reason for the selected next action.

required_skill.description: Recommended skill id, or empty string when no skill is required.

preferred_cli.description: Preferred CLI command for the next action, or empty string when the packet is only a decision.

preferred_cli_effect.description: Effect class of the preferred CLI command.

cli_availability.description: How strongly the packet depends on an available CLI.

module_slot.description: Workspace module or sub-slot that owns the next action.

allowed_next_actions.description: Actions allowed before the next wider context read or implementation step.

forbidden_actions.description: Actions forbidden by this packet until a newer compact packet supersedes it.

implementation_allowed.description: Whether implementation may begin from this packet without additional planning, proof setup, or skill-guided escalation.

read_only_allowed.description: Whether non-mutating inspection, review, issue triage, or report generation may continue from this packet.

exploration_allowed.description: Whether exploratory read-only work may continue even when implementation is gated.

allowed_read_only_actions.description: Examples of read-only action classes allowed before implementation ownership changes.

proof_required.description: Whether proof is required before claiming the next action is complete.

completion_claim_allowed.description: Whether the packet permits claiming completion at the current claim level.

implementation.description: Implementation permission state represented independently from read-only allowance.

completion_claim.description: Completion-claim permission state represented independently from read-only allowance.

gate_result.description: Gate or action result that explains the implementation boundary.

required_before_implementation.description: Required action ids or commands before implementation may proceed.

rule.description: Human-readable rule distinguishing exploration permission from implementation and completion claims.

claim_boundary.description: Boundary packet that prevents read-only allowance from being mistaken for implementation or completion permission.

closure_blockers.description: Reasons closure or completion claims are blocked.

continuation_owner_required.description: Whether unfinished intent needs an explicit continuation owner before closeout.

memory_consultation_status.description: Memory consultation or durable-residue status relevant to the next action.

surface.description: Payload surface whose authority categories are being described.

authority_class.description: Dominant authority class for the surface.

enforced_by_aw.description: Hard gates or constraints AW enforces for this surface.

observed_by_aw.description: Mechanical facts, evidence, path state, or configuration AW observed.

recommended_by_aw.description: Advisory next actions or support signals AW recommends without owning semantic judgment.

candidate_routes.description: Possible routes AW surfaced for the agent to evaluate.

proof_hints.description: Proof burden or validation hints relevant to the surface.

agent_owned_decisions.description: Semantic, route, proof-proportionality, or completion judgments the agent owns.

human_owned_decisions.description: Intent, acceptance, or handoff decisions requiring human ownership when present.

reporting_rule.description: How agents should report the boundary without overstating AW authority.

authority_boundary.description: Authority boundary showing what AW enforces, observes, recommends, or leaves to agent and human judgment.

fallback_if_cli_unavailable.description: Conservative fallback when the preferred CLI cannot be used.

source_fields.description: Startup fields used to derive the packet.

next_safe_action.description: Typed decision packet that tells agents what is safe next, which module or skill owns it, which CLI/fallback applies, and what cannot be claimed yet.

surface.description: Surface or packet the boundary describes.

authority_class.description: Dominant authority class for this packet.

enforced_by_aw.description: Constraints or gates AW is enforcing.

observed_by_aw.description: Mechanical facts or state AW observed.

recommended_by_aw.description: Advisory next actions or support signals AW recommends.

candidate_routes.description: Candidate routes AW surfaced without making them semantic authority.

proof_hints.description: Proof hints or proof burden signals AW surfaced.

agent_owned_decisions.description: Semantic decisions the agent remains responsible for.

human_owned_decisions.description: Intent or acceptance decisions that require human ownership when present.

reporting_rule.description: How agents should describe this boundary in user-facing reports.

authority_boundary.description: Authority boundary separating AW gates, observed facts, advisory support, and agent-owned decisions.
